query:
SELECT 
  cp.id,
  cp.dealId,
  d.customerName,
  d.contractType,
  d.contractStartDate,
  cp.payoutYear,
  cp.payoutMonth,
  cp.payoutNumber,
  cp.grossCommissionUsd,
  cp.netCommissionUsd,
  cp.netCommissionGbp,
  cp.fxRateUsed,
  COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY cp.dealId, cp.payoutMonth) as duplicate_count
FROM commission_payouts cp
JOIN deals d ON cp.dealId = d.id
WHERE cp.aeId = 2
ORDER BY cp.payoutYear, cp.payoutMonth, d.customerName, cp.payoutNumber;

  cp.dealId,
  d.customerName,
  d.contractType,
  d.contractStartDate,
  cp.payoutYear,
  cp.payoutMonth,
  cp.payoutNumber,
  cp.grossCommissionUsd,
  cp.netCommissionUsd,
  cp.netCommissionGbp,
  cp.fxRateUsed,
  COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY cp.dealId, cp.payoutMonth) as duplicate_count
FROM commission_payouts cp
JOIN deals d ON cp.dealId = d.id
WHERE cp.aeId = 2
ORDER BY cp.payoutYear, cp.payoutMonth, d.customerName, cp.payoutNumber;
